notes:
v2.2.2 Update
✨ Decimal currency support: Wallet, Banking, and Gacha inputs now accept fractional amounts for currencies configured as decimal in GlitchSmith Library (for example SWADE's single-currency setup). GM wallet edits, deposit/withdraw/transfer forms, gacha pool costs, and currency rewards all respect the configured precision. Integer currencies (D&D 5e, PF2e, etc.) keep their existing whole-number behavior.

v2.2.1 Update
🐛 Wallet App now lists sheet currencies only as Sheet/Physical entries in the balance list and GM direct-management dropdown.

v2.2.0 Update
✨ Added a GM System Toast sender with default, info, success, warning, and error toast styles. GMs can send to all active users or to selected users from GM Settings, or via a GM-only shortcut in Control Center.
✨ Added Simple Calendar Reborn as a Time Settings source. The original Simple Calendar integration is still available.
✨ GMs can now edit phone numbers regardless of the player custom-number setting.
✨ Added a public Banking API. Other GlitchSmith modules can read and update a character's primary bank balance, and history entries are recorded on each transaction. Stylish Shop v1.3.2+ uses this for its Smartphone Banking payment route.
🐛 The Calendar app no longer opens itself when Simple Calendar advances time while another phone app is active.
🐛 Smartphone Widget action button styles no longer affect chat cards from other systems or modules.
🗑️ Update and announcement popups now come from GlitchSmith Library instead of the module's own notifier.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.2.2
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.2.2 is ready.

  • Decimal currency support: Wallet, Banking, and Gacha inputs accept fractional amounts for currencies configured as decimal in GlitchSmith Library (for example SWADE). Integer currencies behave as before.
